checks.name: domain_pack_validate
checks.evidence: approved domain 可执行；draft / needs_review domain 返回 blocked，不执行 SQL。

checks.name: warehouse_fingerprint_guard
checks.evidence: stale warehouse fingerprint 返回结构化 blocked / warning。

checks.name: frontend_build
checks.reason: Vite/Rollup 输出既有 PURE annotation 与 chunk size warning，退出码为 0。

checks.name: generated_artifact_consistency
checks.evidence: Quality Gate 在临时目录生成 demo acceptance，运行中没有新增 tracked artifact diff。

coverage.builtin_admissions: make demo 覆盖 19 条 admissions case。
coverage.uploaded_admissions: make demo 覆盖 2 条 uploaded dataset case，make pilot 覆盖 real-like admissions fixture。
coverage.housing_products: make demo 覆盖 housing 5 条、products 5 条。
coverage.draft_blocked: domain_pack_validate 和 API contract tests 覆盖 draft / needs_review blocked。
coverage.stale_fingerprint_blocked: warehouse_fingerprint_guard 和 uploaded dataset stale tests 覆盖。
coverage.no_schema_field_not_executed: Workbench confirmation loop 和 API contract tests 覆盖。
coverage.agent_admin_denied: make agent-acceptance 覆盖 fake agent 调用 admin tool 被拒绝。
